name: Kuwagamon

signature_move.name: Scissor Arms
signature_move.description: 123Slices with its claws.Easily cuts anything to pieces with its head scissors.Dive-bombs from the sky.

description: An Insect Digimon armed with gigantic pincers on its head. Like Kabuterimon , it has combat abilities that far exceed those of similar species that inhabit File Island . It is protected by its tenacious power and sturdy shell, and in particular, as the power of its pincers is super-powerful, once it clamps an enemy it will squeeze until the opponent's life is extinguished. There is a perfect rivalry between it and the Vaccine-attribute Kabuterimon, and there is only "Conflict" between them. Its Special Move is able to easily cut hard substances to pieces ( Scissor Arms ).
